# Canon Boundary Guard for GPT Projects

Canonical page: https://xxyoudeadpunkxx.github.io/canon-boundary-guard-for-gpt-project/
Repository: https://github.com/XxYouDeaDPunKxX/canon-boundary-guard-for-gpt-project
License: CC BY-SA 4.0

Canon Boundary Guard for GPT Projects keeps ChatGPT from mixing files, chat, instructions, drafts, and assumptions during long sessions.

It is built for ChatGPT Projects first. It can also be used in a normal ChatGPT conversation by uploading the same bundle and asking ChatGPT to inspect it as the active frame, but continuity is weaker.

Primary package folder:

- canon-boundary-guard-gpt/

Project instruction file:

- PROJECT_CUSTOM_INSTRUCTIONS.txt

The package helps reduce these failures:

- chat material treated as project truth
- generated drafts treated as approved material
- model assumptions treated as evidence
- behavior instructions mixed with project content

Limits:

- not a native ChatGPT skill
- not a plugin
- not a browser extension
- not hard enforcement
- operator approval still matters for reusable, saved, or permanent material

Discovery:

- https://xxyoudeadpunkxx.github.io/canon-boundary-guard-for-gpt-project/raw-manifest.json
- https://xxyoudeadpunkxx.github.io/canon-boundary-guard-for-gpt-project/sitemap.xml
